summary: All 9 steps completed in one iteration. Wrote 12 new tests across 4 test classes covering CONFIG_PATH env-var save/restore and service close() edge cases for all three maintenance entrypoints. Discovered that assert_not_awaited() is only valid on AsyncMock, not MagicMock; used assert_not_called() for the service-never-created sentinel check. 84 maintenance tests pass, 0 failures.
